name: obsidian-doc-writer
description: Orchestrates technical documentation workflows for existing Obsidian vaults.

interface.shortDescription: Write technical docs for existing Obsidian vaults
interface.longDescription: Creates and edits architecture notes, ADRs, runbooks, API docs, Mermaid diagrams, Canvas boards, and Bases indexes inside an existing Obsidian vault.
defaultPrompt: Write an ADR and link it to related notes.
Create a Mermaid sequence diagram for this flow.
Build a docs index base for this vault.
